---
toc: false
---

::: text-center
# Health in Central Denmark

![Eksempel på billede](images/diverse cohort.png){fig-alt="Diverse group in a vector-style illustrated portrait." width="30em"}

[About HICD](hicd/index.qmd){.btn
.btn-primary role="button"} [Available data](available-data/index.qmd){.btn
.btn-primary role="button"}

[How to get data](how-to-get-data/index.qmd){.btn
.btn-primary role="button"} [Publications](available-data/index.qmd){.btn
.btn-primary role="button"}

:::
